title: Security
description:
Refers to the protection of system information and resources against unauthorized access. A secure system ensures confidentiality, integrity, and traceability.
[ul]
[b]Confidentiality[/b]: access restricted to authorized parties.
[b]Integrity[/b]: data protected against improper changes.
[b]Non‑repudiation[/b]: actions cannot be denied later.
[b]Usage traceability[/b]: actions traceable to users.
[b]Authenticity[/b]: identity verified.
[b]Resistance[/b]: maintains operation under attack.[/ul]
